calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Attorney'S Fees Pursuant To Ccp 1717, Ccp 1032, Ccp 1033.5 & Ccp 685.040
Off Calendar Aug-02-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Motion for award of Attorney's Fees pursuant to CCP 1717, CCP 1032 Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Denise Doucette.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Creditors Trade Association Inc. dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
After hearing the testimony presented, the Court taken the matter under submission, counsel to prepare and submit a Proposed Order directly to Dept. 218.

Aug. 2, 2007
Order Denying Motion for Award of Attoney's Fees signed by Comm. Kaplan

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2007 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-02-2007 Continued To Jun-22-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar May-10-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: T. Paxton.
Robert Resner, Esq. for Plaintiff: Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
Plaintiff's Witness: Pam Frese was sworn and examined.
Exhibit 1 - Invoices------------------------------------ID/EVID
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: BFM Plumbing, Inc., a California Corp.; Melissa Ferrari, aka Melissa P. Ferrari aka, Melissa Alys, individually as guarantor of BFM Plumbin, Inc.; and The Estate of Bret A.Ferrari as follows:
Damages $77,191.92
Prejudgment Interest $6,705.91
Costs $467.50for a total of $84,365.33
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court.
